articles.title: Ether Hits 11-Month High As Shapella Gains Add Up Despite Over 1 Million ETH Withdrawals
articles.description: All eyes are now fixed on Ethereum (ETH) after the Shanghai upgrade, allowing validators to withdraw their staked assets from the network for the first time since the Merge.

articles.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) at Crossroads as Price Reaches Pivotal Level
articles.description: Shiba Inu will have to decide direction it is willing to go in at this point

articles.title: Tether market cap eyes record high after regaining 65% stablecoin dominance
articles.description: The market capitalization of Tether is nearly a billion dollar away from reaching a new lifetime peak while rival stablecoins struggle.

articles.title: Breaking: US SEC takes action against crypto exchange Bittrex and its former CEO
articles.description: - The SEC has sued Bittrex and its former CEO for providing services in the United States without proper registration - In its complaint, the commission has listed six tokens as securities including Algorand (ALGO)
